title.en: Taking a Car to a Garage for Repairs

phrases.en: My car is making a strange noise. When can you look at it?
phrases.zh: 我的车发出奇怪的声音。你什么时候能看一下？

phrases.en: I called for an appointment to get my car fixed.
I took my car in to the garage.
And the mechanic diagnosed the problem.
Yep. Sounds like a valve problem.
phrases.zh: 对。听起来像是气门的问题。

phrases.en: How much will it cost to fix?
I asked him for an estimate of the cost.
phrases.zh: 我向他询问了费用的估价。

phrases.en: When I came back later to pick up the car.
phrases.zh: 后来我回来取车的时候。

phrases.en: That'll be $294 for parts and labor.
He gave me the bill for the repair.
